siteId.description: The siteId to help locate the externalReference. For example, when the externalReference is a group belonging to a site.

after.description: Pagination cursor, only members after the cursor will be returned

first.description: Maximum number of members to be returned

siteId.description: If the org mandates site-scoped teams, a site ID must be provided or the operation will fail. [Deprecated] We have deprecated the empty siteId since it only works for org-scoped teams and teams are moving to unit-scope. It's recommended to always provide a valid siteId to ensure this operation continues to work in the future.

asap.description: Include an ASAP token in the `Authorization` header as a Bearer token

get.description: This returns a list of all teams contained under an organization. This may be used as an option to export teams data within your organization.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation the teams are to be retrieved from.
parameters.name: orgId

parameters.description: [Optional] The ID of the site to retrieve teams which are site scoped. Please note that if the org is site-scoped, teams will not be included in response if siteId is not provided. [Deprecated] We have deprecated the empty siteId since it only works for org-scoped teams and teams are moving to unit-scope. It's recommended to always provide a valid siteId to ensure this operation continues to work in the future.
parameters.name: siteId

parameters.description: The page size for the number of teams to return (max 300)
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: An optional cursor token. Leave off for the first request.
parameters.name: cursor

200.description: Teams retrieved successfully. The details of the team are in the response.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

post.description: Creates a team, and adds the requesting user as the initial member.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation the team is to be created under.
parameters.name: orgId

requestBody.description: Details of the team to be created.

201.description: Team created successfully. The details of the team are in the response, including the team ID, which can be used to reference the team for other operations.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation that owns the teams to archive.
parameters.name: orgId

requestBody.description: The list of team IDs to archive. All IDs must belong to the organisation specified in the path.

200.description: Bulk archive processed. Completed team IDs appear in 'successfulTeamIds'; any failures are listed in 'errors'.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

post.description: Creates an external linked team, and membership will be synced with the external reference.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation the team is to be created under.
parameters.name: orgId

requestBody.description: Details of the team to be created.

201.description: Team created successfully. The details of the team are in the response, including the team ID, which can be used to reference the team for other operations.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation that owns the teams to unarchive.
parameters.name: orgId

requestBody.description: The list of team IDs to archive. All IDs must belong to the organisation specified in the path.

200.description: Bulk unarchive processed. Completed team IDs appear in 'successfulTeamIds'; any failures are listed in 'errors'.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation the team is to be deleted from.
parameters.name: orgId

parameters.description: The ID of the team to be deleted.
parameters.name: teamId

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation the team is to be retrieved from.
parameters.name: orgId

parameters.description: The ID of the team to be retrieved.
parameters.name: teamId

parameters.description: [Optional] The ID of the site to retrieve teams which are site scoped. Please note that if the org is site-scoped, teams will not be included in response if siteId is not provided. [Deprecated] We have deprecated the empty siteId since it only works for org-scoped teams and teams are moving to unit-scope. It's recommended to always provide a valid siteId to ensure this operation continues to work in the future.
parameters.name: siteId

200.description: Team retrieved successfully. The details of the team are in the response.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

patch.description: This will only update the fields that get passed in and leave the rest as unmodified.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation the team to be updated belongs to.
parameters.name: orgId

parameters.description: The ID of the team to be updated.
parameters.name: teamId

requestBody.description: Details the team is to be updated with.

200.description: Team updated successfully. The updated details of the team are in the response.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

post.description: Links an existing team to an external reference, and membership and team name will be synced with the external reference.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation the team and external reference to be linked belongs to.
parameters.name: orgId

parameters.description: The ID of the team to be linked.
parameters.name: teamId

204.description: Team linked to external reference successfully.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

post.summary: Link an existing team to an external reference.

post.description: Returns a set of account IDs who are members of the team, alongside a pagination cursor to retrieve the next page (if available).

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation of the team you are fetching members for.
parameters.name: orgId

parameters.description: The ID of the team you are fetching members for.
parameters.name: teamId

parameters.description: [Optional] The ID of the site you are fetching members for. [Deprecated] We have deprecated the empty siteId since it only works for org-scoped teams and teams are moving to unit-scope. It's recommended to always provide a valid siteId to ensure this operation continues to work in the future.
parameters.name: siteId

requestBody.description: Optional Relay-style pagination controls. Can be omitted if empty.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

post.description: The account IDs specified will be added to the team.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation of the team you are adding members to.
parameters.name: orgId

parameters.description: The ID of the team you are adding members to.
parameters.name: teamId

requestBody.description: A set of account IDs to add as members.

200.description: Team members were added successfully, at least partially. See the 'members' field of the response for any successful additions, and the 'errors' field of the response for any failed additions.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

post.description: The account IDs specified will be removed from the team.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation of the team you are removing members from.
parameters.name: orgId

parameters.description: The ID of the team you are removing members from.
parameters.name: teamId

requestBody.description: A set of account IDs to remove as members.

200.description: Team members were removed successfully, at least partially. See the 'errors' field of the response for any failed removals.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

parameters.description: The ID of the organisation the team belongs to
parameters.name: orgId

parameters.description: The ID of the team to restore
parameters.name: teamId

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

put.description: This updates the cover photo of the team. The cover photo must be a valid image file.

parameters.description: The ID of the team to be updated.
parameters.name: teamId

requestBody.description: The cover photo to be uploaded.

400.description: One or more values that were provided were invalid.

415.description: Cover photo is not a valid image file.

422.description: Team cover photo cannot be uploaded in FedRAMP boundary.

tags.description: Manage the members of a team
tags.name: Teams Members Public API
